title: Antioxidant Properties of Cerium Oxide Nanoparticles Prevent Retinal Neovascular Alterations In Vitro and In Vivo

paper_analysis.summary: The study tests cerium oxide nanoparticles as an antioxidant treatment to suppress oxidative-stress-driven retinal neovascularization in cell culture and a mouse light-damage model of AMD.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No explicit dataset or source data is indicated in the available information; the paper appears to report experimental results from in vitro and in vivo assays without any accessible accompanying data files.
